title: 7 Things Scripture Actually Commands a Brother to Do for You
caption:
7 things Scripture actually commands a brother to do for you. None of them are "like and comment."

Sharpen you, even when it cuts. Carry what you can't carry alone. Hear your sin and not walk away. Pick you up when you fall, in person, not just in a prayer from a distance.

Tell you the truth even when it costs the friendship. Rejoice with you, not just grieve with you. "There is a friend who sticks closer than a brother" (Proverbs 18:24).

If the men around you aren't doing any of these, they're contacts. Save this and go find a brother.

#faith #brotherhood #christianmen #manofgod #scripture #community
